data.name: Jiangyu

weaponImprint.name: Leaping Tiger
weaponImprint.trait: After using an ultimate skill, the user gains 3 tiles of Additional Movement. This effect can only be activated once per turn.
weaponImprint.effect: Phase damage dealt is increased by 10%/15%/15%/15%/20%/20%. After dealing phase damage, phase damage is permanently increased by 2%/2%/4%/6%/6%/10%. If Electric damage is dealt, gains 1 more stack of the phase damage increase effect, up to a maximum of 6/6/4/3/3/2 stacks. Upon reaching 6/6/4/3/3/2 stacks, active targeted Physical attacks will instead deal Electric damage. This has a cooldown of 4/3/3/3/3/2 turns. Additionally, Electric damage dealt is permanently increased by 5%, and stability damage dealt is permanently increased by 1 point.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to PMC units is increased by 2.5%. If the target has a defense debuff, the damage is further increased by 2.5%.

data.effects: A lively and enthusiastic Doll who follows in her older sister's footsteps with a carefree spirit. She roams the lands with her bandmates, bringing fresh and fiery notes to "Monsoon".

skills.name: Form-Intention Fist
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Grand Aura
skills.description:
At the start of the turn, Jiangyu gains 1 point of Confectance Index. At the end of the action, if Confectance Index is full, expends all points of Confectance Index and reduces the cooldown of the Ultimate skill Rolling Thunder by 1 turn.

When enemy units gain [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] multiple times, applies 1 stack of [effect:6e4bce1a-755f-41ae-8de8-2f71581991f4] to them for 2 turns. When allied units gain [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] multiple times, applies 1 stack of [effect:606069e8-1303-4970-81ae-9fbaf3334049] to them for 3 turns.

When an enemy unit within range takes targeted damage from an allied unit, prioritizes launching 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] against the target, and Jiangyu gains 1 stack of [effect:452c5bd4-0685-42e4-aeb8-0539acae4c40]. If the target's stability is greater than 0, deals Electric Damage equal to 45% of attack and 3 points of stability damage. If the target is in Stability Break, deals Electric Damage equal to 75% of attack instead. This effect can be triggered up to 2 times per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
At the start of the battle, deals 4 points of fixed stability damage to all enemy targets within 8 tiles. At the start of the turn, Jiangyu gains 1 point of Confectance Index. At the end of the action, if Confectance Index is full, expends all points of Confectance Index and reduces the cooldown of the Ultimate skill Rolling Thunder by 1 turn.

When enemy units gain [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] multiple times, applies 1 stack of [effect:6e4bce1a-755f-41ae-8de8-2f71581991f4] to them for 2 turns. When allied units gain [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] multiple times, applies 1 stack of [effect:606069e8-1303-4970-81ae-9fbaf3334049] to them for 3 turns.

When an enemy unit within range takes targeted damage from an allied unit, prioritizes launching 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] against the target and gains 1 stack of [effect:452c5bd4-0685-42e4-aeb8-0539acae4c40]. If the target's stability is greater than 0, deals Electric Damage equal to 45% of attack and 3 points of stability damage. If the target is in Stability Break, deals Electric Damage equal to 75% of attack instead. This effect can be triggered up to 3 times per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
At the start of the battle, deals 8 points of fixed stability damage to all enemy targets within 8 tiles. At the start of the turn, Jiangyu gains 1 point of Confectance Index. At the end of the action, if Confectance Index is full, expends all points of Confectance Index and reduces the cooldown of the Ultimate skill Rolling Thunder by 1 turn.

When enemy units gain [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] multiple times, applies 1 stack of [effect:6e4bce1a-755f-41ae-8de8-2f71581991f4] to them for 2 turns. When allied units gain [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] multiple times, applies 1 stack of [effect:606069e8-1303-4970-81ae-9fbaf3334049] to them for 3 turns.

When an enemy unit within range takes targeted damage from an allied unit, prioritizes launching 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] against the target and gains 1 stack of [effect:452c5bd4-0685-42e4-aeb8-0539acae4c40]. If the target's stability is greater than 0, deals Electric Damage equal to 45% of attack and 3 points of stability damage. If the target is in Stability Break, deals Electric Damage equal to 75% of attack instead. This effect can be triggered up to 3 times per turn.

When Jiangyu has [effect:452c5bd4-0685-42e4-aeb8-0539acae4c40], Electric Damage dealt is increased by 15%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
[effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] can be triggered 1 more time.

At the start of the battle, deals 4 points of fixed stability damage to all enemy targets within 8 tiles.

[effect:6e4bce1a-755f-41ae-8de8-2f71581991f4] gains a new effect: Upon receiving this effect, takes fixed damage equal to (current stacks x 10%) of the inflictor's attack.

[effect:606069e8-1303-4970-81ae-9fbaf3334049] gains a new effect: Upon receiving this effect, recovers HP equal to 10% of max HP.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
Fixed stability damage dealt at the start of the battle is increased by 4 points.

When Jiangyu has [effect:452c5bd4-0685-42e4-aeb8-0539acae4c40], Electric damage dealt is increased by 15%.

Maximum stacks of [effect:6e4bce1a-755f-41ae-8de8-2f71581991f4] is increased by 3 stacks.

The effect of [effect:606069e8-1303-4970-81ae-9fbaf3334049] is changed: The amount of defense ignored when dealing Electric damage is increased to 10% and healing received is increased to 10%.

skills.name: Thunderclap
skills.description: Selects one enemy target within a 3x3 area and deals melee AoE Electric damage equal to 90% of attack to it and all enemy targets within a 3x3 area, as well as generating [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles for 3 turns. If this attack exploits a phase weakness, deals an additional 5 points of stability damage. After the attack, Jiangyu gains 6 tiles of Additional Movement and 1 instance of [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects one enemy target within a 3x3 area and deals melee AoE Electric damage equal to 90% of attack to it and all enemy targets within a 3x3 area, as well as generating [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles for 3 turns. If this attack exploits a phase weakness, deals an additional 5 points of stability damage. When dealing stability damage, deals 5 points of fixed stability damage to all enemy targets afflicted with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623]. Before the attack, Jiangyu gains [effect:13704d31-93dc-41f4-8ae8-52bf9ceb0a06] for 3 turns. After the attack, Jiangyu gains 6 tiles of Additional Movement and 1 instance of [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Before the attack, Jiangyu gains [effect:13704d31-93dc-41f4-8ae8-52bf9ceb0a06] for 3 turns.

When dealing stability damage, deals 5 points of fixed stability damage to all enemy targets afflicted with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623].

skills.name: Lightning Smash
skills.description:
Selects one enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Electric damage equal to 110% of attack to it. If the target is in Stability Break, Jiangyu gains 1 stack of [effect:452c5bd4-0685-42e4-aeb8-0539acae4c40] before this skill resolves.

Jiangyu gains 2 points of Confectance Index.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects one enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Electric damage equal to 140% of attack to it. Damage dealt against targets afflicted with [effect:6e4bce1a-755f-41ae-8de8-2f71581991f4] is increased by 30%. Before dealing damage, cleanses 1 buff from the target. If the target is in Stability Break, Jiangyu gains 1 stack of [effect:452c5bd4-0685-42e4-aeb8-0539acae4c40] before this skill resolves.

Jiangyu gains 2 points of Confectance Index.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Selects one enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Electric damage equal to 140% of attack to it. If the target is in Stability Break, Jiangyu gains 1 stack of [effect:452c5bd4-0685-42e4-aeb8-0539acae4c40] before this skill resolves and performs an additional attack. Damage dealt against targets afflicted with [effect:6e4bce1a-755f-41ae-8de8-2f71581991f4] is increased by 30%. Before dealing damage, cleanses 2 buffs from the target.

Jiangyu gains 2 points of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Damage multiplier is increased to 140%.

Damage dealt against targets afflicted with [effect:6e4bce1a-755f-41ae-8de8-2f71581991f4] is increased by 30%. Before dealing damage, cleanses 1 buff from the target.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
Cleanses 1 more buff from the target.

If the target is in Stability Break, Jiangyu performs an additional attack.

skills.name: Rolling Thunder
skills.description:
Selects one enemy target within 8 tiles, gains 2 stacks of [effect:452c5bd4-0685-42e4-aeb8-0539acae4c40], and deals Electric damage that ignores Cover equal to 130% of attack to the target. Applies [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] to all allied Dolls for 3 turns, cleanses 1 debuff, and removes [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] and [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d].

Jiangyu gains 1 point of Confectance Index.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects one enemy target within 8 tiles, gains 2 stacks of [effect:452c5bd4-0685-42e4-aeb8-0539acae4c40], and deals Electric damage that ignores Cover equal to 130% of attack to the target. Restores 2 points of stability to all allied dolls and applies [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] that lasts 3 turns to them. In addition, cleanses 2 debuffs and removes [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b], [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3], and [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790].

Jiangyu gains 2 points of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Cooldown is reduced by 1 turn. Jiangyu gains 1 more point of Confectance Index. Restores 2 points of stability to all allied Dolls, cleanses 1 debuff and removes [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3] and [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790].

keys.effect: Damage dealt to enemies in Stability Break is increased by 10%.

When an enemy enters Stability Break, it takes Electric Damage equal to 90% of Jiangyu's attack (does not trigger [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623]). When an allied unit with 3 stacks of [effect:606069e8-1303-4970-81ae-9fbaf3334049] deals damage, for each stack of [effect:6e4bce1a-755f-41ae-8de8-2f71581991f4] on the enemy unit, the allied unit's critical rate is increased by 2% and its critical damage is increased by 3%.
At the start of the battle, Jiangyu gains 4 stacks of [effect:452c5bd4-0685-42e4-aeb8-0539acae4c40].

Before an enemy unit within 8 tiles makes an active attack, performs 1 instance of [effect:013c5bd7-5fbe-4337-8f26-70872d9a5800], dealing Electric damage equal to 60% of attack and 2 points of stability damage to it. Before resolving this skill, applies [effect:d4fd8953-92c9-4830-ad8b-ac4d56d95b7d] to the target for 1 turn. This effect can be triggered up to 2 times per turn.

Upon being afflicted with [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3], [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790], or [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b], cleanses them immediately. This effect has a cooldown of 1 turn.
At the start of the turn, applies [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] to the allied Doll with the highest attack for 3 turns.
Before allied units (excluding Jiangyu) with [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] make an active attack, applies [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] to the target for 2 turns.
Stability damage take by all allied units is reduced by 1 point.

vertebrae.effect:
[effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] can be triggered 1 more time.

At the start of the battle, deals 4 points of fixed stability damage to all enemy targets within 8 tiles.

[effect:6e4bce1a-755f-41ae-8de8-2f71581991f4] gains a new effect: Upon receiving this effect, takes fixed damage equal to (current stacks x 10%) of the inflictor's attack.

[effect:606069e8-1303-4970-81ae-9fbaf3334049] gains a new effect: Upon receiving this effect, recovers HP equal to 10% of max HP.

When allied units gain [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] multiple times, applies 1 stack of [effect:606069e8-1303-4970-81ae-9fbaf3334049] to them for 3 turns.

When an enemy unit within range takes targeted damage from an allied unit, prioritizes launching 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] against the target, and Jiangyu gains 1 stack of [effect:452c5bd4-0685-42e4-aeb8-0539acae4c40]. If the target's stability is greater than 0, deals Electric Damage equal to 45% of attack and 3 points of stability damage. If the target is in Stability Break, deals Electric Damage equal to 75% of attack instead. This effect can be triggered up to 2 times per turn.

skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel3:
At the start of the battle, deals 8 points of fixed stability damage to all enemy targets within 8 tiles. At the start of the turn, Jiangyu gains 1 point of Confectance Index. At the end of the action, if Confectance Index is full, expends all points of Confectance Index and reduces the cooldown of the Ultimate skill Rolling Thunder by 1 turn.

When enemy units gain [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] multiple times, applies 1 stack of [effect:6e4bce1a-755f-41ae-8de8-2f71581991f4] to them for 2 turns. When allied units gain [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] multiple times, applies 1 stack of [effect:606069e8-1303-4970-81ae-9fbaf3334049] to them for 3 turns.

When an enemy unit within range takes targeted damage from an allied unit, prioritizes launching 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] against the target and gains 1 stack of [effect:452c5bd4-0685-42e4-aeb8-0539acae4c40]. If the target's stability is greater than 0, deals Electric Damage equal to 45% of attack and 3 points of stability damage. If the target is in Stability Break, deals Electric Damage equal to 75% of attack instead. This effect can be triggered up to 3 times per turn.

When Jiangyu has [effect:452c5bd4-0685-42e4-aeb8-0539acae4c40], Electric Damage dealt is increased by 15%.

imagoforms.effect: For every instance of Electric damage dealt by this unit, Electric damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 1%, maximum of 3%. Does not stack.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Electric damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 4%, maximum of 3 stacks. The effect's potency is progressively reduced by 1% each time a new stack is applied.
Attack and max HP is increased by 4%.
After inflicting a critical hit, deals 3 points of fixed stability damage to the enemy target. This effect can trigger up to 2 times per turn.

dollEffects.effectDetails: Stability damage dealt is increased by 1 point. If the target's stability is greater than 0, when using the basic attack Form-Intention Fist, the active skill Thunderclap, or the active skill Lightning Smash, expends all stacks and deals fixed stability damage equal to (stacks spent x3) points to the target, maximum of 5 stacks. Cannot be cleansed.

{"mainDetails":"

When dealing Electric damage, ignores 5% of the target's defense. In addition, healing received is increased by 5%. Maximum of 3 stacks. Considered an Electric buff, cannot be cleansed.

Dandegate Note: This effect is bugged. It uses the stacks on Jiangyu to calculate the % of defense ignored instead of the holder (Holder must have at least 1 stack). The effect behaves correctly in the level 3 (V6) version of the skill. Last replicate on March 19th, 2026 and may have been fixed since then.
